items.name_en: Original leather 5BG291, New arrival vintage tote bag, made with new soft lambskin leather, soft and premium texture. Inspired by Miu's archival design, this Aventure Nappa leather bag has a restructured, lighter form with a fresh personality. Features embossed letter logo, vintage gold hardware, linen blend lining, zip pocket and patch pocket. Long handle suitable for hand or shoulder carry. Dimensions: 31X40X13CM

items.name_en: Original leather GG Marmont series mini handbag
items.name_cn:
Original leather GG Marmont series mini handbag
811238 AAECK 6207 The GG Marmont series interprets new silhouettes with classic colorways, showcasing early autumn charm. This handbag is crafted from Gucci Rosso Ancora quilted V-shaped leather, featuring a detachable buckle light gold chain shoulder strap. Magnetic snap closure with double G logo, adding extra charm to the design.
Gucci Rosso Ancora quilted V-shaped leather
Gucci Rosso Ancora leather trim
Light gold hardware accessories

items.name_en: Original Leather In Stock Chanel Gabrielle. Innovation never disappoints. By integrating power and elegant design aesthetics into the original beauty, the Chanel Gabrielle bag was born. It first appeared at the 2017 Spring/Summer Haute Couture show, and its silhouette has been everywhere at the recent fashion week. The delicate and soft body and the hard and structured bottom fully embody Mademoiselle Chanel's pursuit of freedom and comfort. Size 20cm

items.name_en: Original leather with counter gift box 5BB117: Miu Miu New Patchwork Briefcase, heavy handmade, made of multiple leather splices. The bold innovative design perfectly interprets Miu's unique attitude of unconstrained, casual, and inclusive lifestyle. This bag is cool, capturing a refined multifunctional design that blends men's and women's elements. Casual and lazy, natural and free-spirited, full of personality. Super large capacity and lightweight. New canvas lining, popular globally, loved by fashion bloggers and celebrities. Size: 34X23X12cm (with original packaging)

items.name_en: Original leather with full set of packaging
items.name_cn:
Original leather with full set of packaging
Montaigne Small, in stock!!️
Montaigne Denim Series. I was recommended this bag; it renews the classic letter pattern with irregular stone-washed effects, giving the bag a fresh style. The gradient effect is unique and cool, and the denim print shows off a fashionable charm that looks both premium and visually striking. The size is moderate, perfect for daily outings. The classic shape, iconic letter lock, and exquisite chain strap combine modernity and elegance, a perfect fusion of retro and fashion.
size:21*6*12cm
